testcase.name: test_admin_search_scope_organization
testcase.error: tests/test_iteration_40_email_notifications_and_noregression.py:678: in admin_headers assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"error":{"code":"rate_limit_exceeded","message":"Çok fazla istek. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin.","details":{"retry_after_seconds":300,"remaining":0}}} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_admin_reports_generate
testcase.error: tests/test_iteration_40_email_notifications_and_noregression.py:678: in admin_headers assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Admin login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Admin login failed: {"error":{"code":"rate_limit_exceeded","message":"Çok fazla istek. Lütfen daha sonra tekrar deneyin.","details":{"retry_after_seconds":300,"remaining":0}}} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
